nl_query: Identify all scripts where the cached total marks on the answer script row differs from the total marks on the latest active evaluation attempt by more than 0.5 marks, indicating a cache synchronization issue.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id AS script_id, a.urn, a.total_marks AS cached_total, ea.total_marks AS latest_attempt_total, (ea.total_marks - a.total_marks) AS discrepancy
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
WHERE  ea.status IN ('FROZEN','SUBMITTED')
  AND  ea.is_final  = TRUE
GROUP  BY a.id, a.urn, a.total_marks, ea.total_marks
HAVING ABS(ea.total_marks - a.total_marks) > 0.5
LIMIT  100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): evaluation_attempt.is_final. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
